title: High Court Bail Docket IN-BAIL-2023-0777
summary: Ramesh Kitta Pujari was arrested in February 2017 in connection with a 2016 incident at Gazali Hotel, Mumbai, where shots were fired and extortion threats were issued under the name of gangster Ravi Pujari. He was accused of being a co-conspirator who provided funds generated by the organized cri...
